titleStmt.title: SII 15.69: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 69. (B.K. No. 112 of 1926-27.) HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a wall to the right of entrance into the Trikūṭēśvara temple.

The record is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Plavaṅga, Āshāḍha śu. 5, Monday. The details regularly correspond to 1186 A.D., June 23, Monday, for the previous cyclic year Parābhava and not for Plavaṅga.
It registers a gift of rice made out of his wages by the carpenter Kallōja for the offerings to the god Mōrakēśvara. Agastya-muni, the priest of the temple, was the recipient of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu cāḷukyacakravartti sōmēsvaradēvavarṣada 3
plavaṁga saṁvatsaradāṣāḍha suddha 5 somavāradaṁdu
baḍagi kalōja mōrakēsvara dēvara tōṭa keyi maneya
geyida kūliyenituṁṭanitumaṁ dēvara naivēdyakoṁ
mānakkiya naḍavaṁtāgi taṁna putra pautrarādiyā
giyalliyācāryyaragasta(stya)munīsvara dēvara kālaṁ ka
rcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭayilli baḍagitanakkāru niṁ
ndavaru hiṭṭukāṟa baḍagi kallōja biṭṭa dharmmamaṁ E
ḷu nūrvvaruṁ praje mahābaḷagāvuṁḍanuṁ prati
pālisuvanu .
Digital edition of SII 15.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
